summary: The implementation successfully covers all five core requirements (REQ-6 through REQ-10). Internet Identity authentication is integrated with login/logout UI, quiz submissions are associated with authenticated users, a profile page displays quiz history, backend functions retrieve user attempts with timestamps and scores, and the quiz flow uses authenticated actors when logged in while preserving anonymous functionality.

hallucinated_features.description: Leaderboard functionality showing all users' total scores
hallucinated_features.reason: The backend includes getLeaderboard() and getAllAttempts() functions that aggregate and rank user scores across all users. These social/competitive features were not requested in the BuildRequest, which focused on personal tracking and avoided social features.
